action.reasoning: Observation: All previous training attempts segfault, even with 1000 graphs and manual batching. data_check confirms no invalid edge indices, so crash likely in GINEConv message passing or GPU memory corruption. Simple pooling without message passing (DeepSets baseline) may avoid the crash. Decision: Implement a SimpleMLP arch that encodes node features, pools globally (mean), and predicts 128 tasks; set as default for training. Run 1000-graph training for 3 epochs to verify pipeline works and get baseline AP. Then submit eval to measure iteration time and initial metric.
